---
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla 
  image: ../images/DSC_1003.JPG
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      url: "https://www.linkedin.com/in/natasa-anastasiadou-87405a220/"
    - text: GitHub
      icon: github
      url: "https://github.com/natanast"
    - text: Email
      url: "mailto:anastasiadounat@gmail.com"
    - text: CV
      url: "./files/cv.pdf"
comments: false
---

::: {#hero-heading}
I am a **Computational Biologist \| Bioinformatic Scientist**, at the [Institute of Applied Biosciences](https://www.inab.certh.gr/) (INAB) within the [Centre for Research & Technology, Hellas](https://www.certh.gr/root.en.aspx) (CERTH).

I hold an **M.Sc.** in **Translational Research in Biomedicine** from the Democritus University of Thrace and a **B.Sc.** in **Biochemistry and Biotechnology** from the University of Thessaly. During my Master's research, I discovered a strong interest in **Bioinformatics**, seamlessly transitioning from a molecular background to data-driven biology aiming at extracting actionable insights from complex datasets.

Today, my main focus in on **analyzing** and **visualizing** multi-omics NGS data,  developing interactive **web applications** and **websites**, making data exploration more accessible and user-friendly for biomedical researchers.

You can explore some of my work in my [Visual Portfolio](https://natanast.github.io/qmd/visual_portfolio.html).
:::

![](/timeline.png){.light-mode-only width="825" height="62"} ![](/timeline_dark.png){.dark-mode-only width="825" height="62"}
